items.title:
Most people run one AI agent… this runs 60.RuFlow plugs into Claude Code and handles research, coding, testing, all at once.

Smart routing = cheaper + faster
Shared memory = better results over time But if your inputs are bad, output will still suck.

DM “flow” and I’ll send you the setup link.

#aitools #claudecode #aiagents #automation #tiktoktech

items.title:
Comment "CLAUDE" and follow me to get the free unlimited videos tutorial.
Claude + Remotion makes unlimited AI videos for free on your local computer.
No paid image gen. No paid video gen. No monthly subscription (besides Claude itself).
Setup takes around 30 minutes. After setup, you write a prompt, Claude builds the video with Remotion (a React-based video framework), and you render it locally.
One prompt. Unlimited renders. Zero cost.
How do I make free AI videos with Claude?
What is Remotion and how does it work with Claude?
How do I generate unlimited AI videos locally?
#ai #claude #aivideos #chatgptprompts #aitools
